title: ModActiv S2
description: A Vanilla++ modpack inspired from the wackiness of the ModActiv S1 Modpack
body:
Modactiv S2 is a modpack inspired by the First ever modpack i've made, overall made arround vanilla+ gameplay while still keeping the randomness of the mods in the first Modactiv modpack.

It includes mainly QoL mods as well as some vanilla++ mods like better end and deeper and darker.

It also uses [https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) as a base to make the gameplay feel smoother

Here are some screenshots taken ingame to show what a gameplay with this modpack could look like:

![Modactiv s2 Prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccdf0fe2755863912f54642bcc1880ef039d1174.jpeg)

![Modactiv s2 Prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c6e2ebc3896e78c54cecbf0f57f759adf2d17b8.jpeg)

![Modactiv s2 Prev3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ccc0ea224650834d523ace3dc03c39af7123968.jpeg)

![Modactiv s2 Prev4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddfcde0af0775bdb0a87afe2c8f9b72f583d151e.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
